name: Eternal Energy Public Company Limited
summary: Eternal Energy Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the cassava plantation activities in Thailand. The company is involved in the plantation of tapioca and other energy crops. It also rents real estate properties. The company was formerly known as Sea Horse Public Company Limited and changed its name to Eternal Energy Public Company Limited in October 2009. Eternal Energy Public Company Limited was incorporated in 1987 is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
